### Tile

### Style Properties:

  

Style PropertiesUsage

```

--exo-component-tile-padding | Token to adjust padding of the tile.

```

  
  

![](data:image/png;base64,)

### Exosphere Essentials

The exosphere is the outermost layer of Earth's atmosphere, extending up to 10,000 km. It is where atmospheric particles escape into space.

Learn More

![](data:image/png;base64,)

### Exosphere Essentials

The exosphere is the outermost layer of Earth's atmosphere, extending up to 10,000 km. It is where atmospheric particles escape into space.

### Exosphere Essentials

| Name | Description | Default | Control |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| href | 
link of the tile

string

 | 

https://boomi.com

 | https://boomi.com |
| target | 

target of the link

string

 | 

\_self

 | `one of: _blank | _new | _parent | _self | _top` |
| title | 

title of the tile

string

 | 

This is tile component

 | This is tile component |
| label | 

aria-label of the tile

string

 | 

Label of the tile

 | Label of the tile |
| describedby | 

aria-describedby of the tile

string

 | 

Description of the tile

 | Description of the tile |
| variant | 

variant of the tile

string

 | 

BASE

 | `one of: base | base-alt` |
| rel | 

rel of the link

string

 | \- | noreferrer noopener |
| selected | 

for default selected tile

boolean

 | \- |  |
| enableTransition | 

Enable entrance and exit animations

\-

 | \- |  |
| visible | 

Whether the container is visible or not

\-

 | \- |  |
| click | 

Event gets fired when href is not given

\-

click
